final:
// // This register captures and stores an 8-bit instruction code from the instruction fetch stage in a digital system. It is clocked by a falling edge of the clock signal and is reset to zero when the reset signal is high. If the reset is not active, the current instruction code input is latched and made available as the output.
module top_module(
input Clk,
input Reset,
input[7:0] Instr_Code,
output reg [7:0] IF_ID_Instr_Code
    );always @ (posedge Clk, negedge Reset)
 begin
	 if(Reset == 0)
	 begin
		 IF_ID_Instr_Code <= 0;
	 end
	 
	 else
	 begin
		 IF_ID_Instr_Code <= Instr_Code;
	 end
 end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This register captures and stores an 8-bit instruction code from the instruction fetch stage in a digital system. It is clocked by a falling edge of the clock signal and is reset to zero when the reset signal is high. If the reset is not active, the current instruction code input is latched and made available as the output.
